summary: Good coverage of core functions (parse_version, bump logic, changelog generation) with unit tests. Workflow structure tests verify YAML shape and actionlint compliance. However, critical gap: main() function never tested despite being the entry point. run_act_tests.py has only 4 happy-path cases and doesn't verify changelog content or error behavior. Missing: unit test of main(), error handling paths through act (missing files, invalid JSON), changelog content validation, environment variable handling, and tests for negative cases. Fixture files (commits_patch.txt, etc.) referenced in test_workflow.py but content not provided and not used by run_act_tests.py. Test suite would catch happy-path regressions in bump logic but miss entry point changes, file I/O edge cases, and error handling.
